initialSetup.title: Initial Setup
initialSetup.companyNameHelp: Adding your company name here will append it to the user's full name that appears when doing a remote control session, for example: 'John Doe - Amidaware Inc.'

totpSetup.title: Setup 2-Factor
totpSetup.instructions: Scan the QR Code with your authenticator app and then click Finish to be redirected back to the signin page. If you navigate away from this page your 2FA signin will need to be reset.
totpSetup.manualSetup: You can also use the code below to configure the authenticator manually.
